## Safety Review

- [ ] No secrets or environment values were added or exposed.
- [ ] Authentication, billing, entitlements, RLS, database schemas, and API contracts are unchanged.
- [ ] No production Supabase data was accessed or modified.
- [ ] No production deployment, domain, or DNS setting was changed.
- [ ] Any new dependency is explained below.

## Quality Gate

- [ ] Production build passes.
- [ ] Vercel Preview is ready.
- [ ] Desktop and mobile layouts were checked.
- [ ] No new browser console errors.
- [ ] Keyboard navigation and focus states were checked.
- [ ] Text contrast and content overflow were checked.
- [ ] Publisher and subscriber permissions remain correctly separated.

Dependencies, tradeoffs, or follow-up work:
